title: Rubus stellarcticus

taxonomy: Rubus stellarcticus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the genus Rubus, which includes blackberries, raspberries, and thimbleberries, among other species. The classification of Rubus stellarcticus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the family Rosaceae, it is part of the order Rosales. The classification helps identify the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
